stories.name: conditional-sidecar-spawn
stories.title: Implement conditional sidecar spawn strategy (dev=uv, release=python3)
stories.description: Modify src-tauri/src/commands.rs init_generation to use #[cfg(debug_assertions)] to spawn 'uv run python -m textbrush.ipc' in dev builds and 'python3 -m textbrush.ipc' in release builds.
stories.notes: Use #[cfg(debug_assertions)] / #[cfg(not(debug_assertions))] compile-time flags. Keep existing tests which use python3 directly.

stories.name: enhanced-spawn-error-messages
stories.title: Enhance sidecar spawn error messages for actionable diagnostics
stories.description: Improve the error messages returned when the sidecar fails to spawn. Map OS error codes to human-readable messages: 'python3 not found. Ensure Python 3.11+ is installed.' and 'uv not found. Install uv or set TEXTBRUSH_DEV=0.'
stories.notes: Wrap the Sidecar::spawn error with context-specific messages.

stories.name: update-documentation
stories.title: Update README.md and release workflow to document Python dependency requirement
stories.description: Update README.md Installation section to document that packaged builds require Python 3.11+ with textbrush installed. Update release.yml to include instructions. Update specs/spec.md architecture section to note spawn mechanism distinction.
stories.notes: Document clearly that release builds need python3 -m textbrush.ipc to work.

dependency_notes: Stories are independent. No mocks required.
mock_resolution_plan: No temporary mocks - all changes are independent.
